positive: A majestic, stylized watercolor silhouette of a mythical forest creature—a blend of deer antlers, iridescent hummingbird feathers, and serpentine grace. The creature is leaping through a flowering glen at dawn. Focus on clean lines, strong negative space, and highly contrasting colors: deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and metallic golds, accented by soft peach pinks. The composition must be central, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern or a single striking graphic. Minimalism meets maximalism. Studio Ghibli inspired, Alphonse Mucha influence, woodcut print style, vector illustration, high contrast, smooth gradient, crisp edges.
negative: blur, low resolution, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logos, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, cropped, abstract, photographic, realism, messy, complex background, clutter, disfigured, poor composition
